positive: A stylish, intricate illustration of a mythical forest animal, a griffin or stylized fox, depicted in a clean, symmetrical silhouette style. The subject should be centered and designed with bold, contrasting lines, suggesting a magical or natural element. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette (e.g., emerald green, deep sapphire blue, and crisp cream accents). The background should be minimal or abstract geometric pattern to maintain focus on the animal. Studio quality, highly detailed vector illustration, clean lines, suitable for screen printing on apparel, symmetrical composition, perfect negative space, maximalist yet clean, detailed textures, graphic design.
negative: low quality, blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, celebrity, graffiti, photorealistic, complex background, cluttered, grain, smudge
